summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. The hydrated artifact identified no security-sensitive refs and no shared canonical; hydrated open PRs are retained independently. Items with unavailable live state are blocked for human follow-up because target kind and updated_at were not available from preflight.

actions.reason: Distinct scoped PR with live state; keep for normal maintainer review.
Distinct scoped PR with a failing check; keep independently for maintainer review.
